final_prompt.prompt:
Create a realistic screenshot of a 抖音 live-stream featuring a young woman resembling a famous Chinese actress known as "神仙姐姐".

Style/medium: needs a realistic live-stream screenshot aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a 抖音 live-stream UI screenshot with the host centered, holding a sign
Subject: must include a young woman resembling "神仙姐姐" holding a handwritten sign in front of the camera
Scene/backdrop: needs a typical indoor live-stream room atmosphere — exact backdrop details are yours
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, welcoming live-stream lighting atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！" (on the sign held by the host); must include typical 抖音 live-stream UI overlay elements (viewer count, comments, like icons, etc.)
Constraints: must preserve 9:16 vertical framing; must include 抖音 live-stream interface chrome (top bar, comment feed, interaction buttons)
Avoid:
